title: ReviewStatus
description: DEPRECATED — Use chapter-meta.json instead. Retained for backward compat with books created before v1.1.0. Chapter review status — tracks whether a chapter has been approved, rejected, or is pending review. Mirrors ChapterStatusSchema subset in chapter.ts.

status.description: Review status with full lifecycle support.

reviewedAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the review was performed. Null if not yet reviewed.

reviewerNotes.description: Human-written notes from the review (e.g. 'dialogue feels stilted in scene 2').
